stimulus: These days, dodgeball is mostly thought of as a casual playground game. Surprisingly, an international sports federation once decided ______blank dodgeball as a demonstration event at a major international tournament! Teams from over a dozen countries competed in the demonstration.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The verb “decided” requires a to-infinitive complement to express what was decided. “To feature” correctly forms a subordinate clause indicating what the federation decided to do.

Choice A (finite past) creates a comma splice. Choice C (present participle) doesn’t complete “decided.” Choice D (bare infinitive) is ungrammatical after “decided.”
